name: anti-fake-done
description: Catches the optimistic-success-signaling ("fake-done") defect class: code that reports OK/sent/prevented when the guarantee is absent.

rules.summary: Provider/transport defaults to a no-op stub when an env var is unset (no production guard).
Function returns a hardcoded success flag while using a stub/unimplemented transport.
Mock/placeholder data or fake timers on a non-test production code path.
Dev/design tooling scripts injected into the root layout / production HTML.
